overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai running through a stormy rural landscape. The character travels from tall grass wetlands past a fallen warrior and through fields of white spider lilies under dark overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt path through tall grass wetlands

agents.ego_description: samurai running steadily along the dirt path through tall golden grass

entered.detail: dense golden reeds lining both sides of the path
narrow muddy trail winding through the wetlands
dark heavy storm clouds covering the sky
faint silhouette of trees on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The samurai runs along a narrow dirt path enclosed by dense tall grass under a dark stormy sky. The environment is isolated and moody with natural diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field path at forest edge with scattered trees

events.description: passing a fallen samurai body lying motionless on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the widening path, approaching a fallen figure on the ground

notable_agents.action: fallen samurai lying dead beside the path in dark clothing

entered.detail: sparse trees appearing at the edges of the field
low-lying fog drifting across the distant ground

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider field with scattered trees as the tall grass thins out. The camera passes a fallen samurai lying on the right side of the path, adding a somber note to the stormy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: path lined with white spider lilies approaching forest

events.description: passing a small stone shrine or lantern structure on the right side

agents.ego_description: running through the white flower fields, maintaining steady pace along the trail

entered.detail: fields of white flowers blooming densely on both sides of the path
small traditional stone lantern or shrine marker beside the path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through breathtaking fields of white spider lilies under the dark storm clouds. The character passes a stone shrine marker as the trees draw closer and the landscape becomes more enclosed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, storm-swept rural landscape that shifts from enclosed grasslands to open floral fields. It begins with the samurai running along a narrow dirt path tightly hemmed in by dense tall grass under a dark, overcast sky. As the path widens, the grass thins out into a more open field with scattered trees, passing a fallen samurai lying solemnly by the roadside. The scene then transitions into breathtaking expanses of white spider lilies that blanket the terrain under the heavy storm clouds. Finally, the camera follows the trail past a stone shrine marker as the surrounding trees draw closer, gradually enclosing the landscape once more.
